label: Normalization & standardization

node.label: Normalization & standardization
node.definition: Activation or feature scales are standardized to improve conditioning and stability.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Normalization & standardization is to connect Statistics & experimental design, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors to downstream capabilities including Convolutional neural networks, ResNets & DenseNets, Transformers.
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.

dependencies.rationale: Normalization & standardization uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Normalization & standardization uses Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Activation or feature scales are standardized to improve conditioning and stability.

The role of Normalization & standardization is to connect Statistics & experimental design, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors to downstream capabilities including Convolutional neural networks, ResNets & DenseNets, Transformers.

Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.
